zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Devereaux於1345年出生在英國賀福爾波登哈姆時，她的父親William Devereux30歲，母親Anne Barre33歲。她於1376年與Roger Hynaf Vaughan在英國賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年在英國賀特福爾賀特福德享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Devereaux于1345年出生在英国賀福爾波登哈姆时，她的父亲William Devereux30岁，母亲Anne Barre33岁。她于1376年与Roger Hynaf Vaughan在英国賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1403年在英国賀特福爾賀特福德享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Devereaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devereux
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Devereaux was born in 1345, in Bodenham, Herefordshire, England, her father, William Devereux, was 30 and her mother, Anne Barre, was 33. She married Roger Hynaf Vaughan in 1376, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1403, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Devereaux est née en 1345, à Bodenham, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Devereux, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne Barre, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Hynaf Vaughan en 1376, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1403, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Devereaux 1345 in Bodenham, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Devereux 30 und ihre Mutter Anne Barre 33. Sie hat 1376 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England Roger Hynaf Vaughan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1403 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Devereauxが1345年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアボデンハムで生まれた時，父William Devereuxは30歳，母Anne Barreは33歳であった。1376年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでRoger Hynaf Vaughanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Devereaux(이)가 1345년 영국 허퍼드실르 보데함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Devereux(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Barre(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1376년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Roger Hynaf Vaughan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Devereaux родилась в 1345 г. в местности боденам, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Devereux было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Barre, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Hynaf Vaughan в 1376 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1403 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Devereaux nació en 1345, en Bodenham, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Devereux, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne Barre, tenía 33 años. Murió en 1403, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
